name: happy-audio-gen
description: Universal AI voice / text-to-speech skill supporting OpenAI TTS (gpt-4o-mini-tts, tts-1), ElevenLabs multilingual TTS with voice cloning, Bailian Qwen TTS (qwen-tts / qwen3-tts-vd with voice-design custom voices, long-text chunking built in), MiniMax speech-02-hd, SiliconFlow CosyVoice / SenseVoice, and PlayHT 2.0. Use this skill whenever the user asks to read text aloud, synthesize speech, generate narration, create voice-over, dub a script, or turn any text into audio (mp3 / wav / ogg / flac).
author: iamzhihuix
summary_zh: 这是一个聚合多款主流AI引擎的万能文字转语音工具，适合文本朗读、视频配音、生成旁白等场景，帮你轻松把任意文字变成音频文件。
